description_long: This is a medium-sized duffel-style briefcase with a cylindrical body and rounded ends, primarily constructed from a dark fabric material. The front features a large zippered pocket, while the main compartment is accessed via a zipper running along the top. Two sturdy, flexible handles made of a lighter material are attached to the top, with a padded grip for comfortable carrying. The back side displays a diagonal strap or accent, possibly for securing the bag to luggage or for aesthetic purposes. The ends of the bag are plain, with one side showing additional strap details, and the overall design is utilitarian and suitable for urban travel or gym use.
description: A dark, cylindrical duffel-style briefcase with light handles, a front zippered pocket, and accent straps on the back. The design is practical and urban, with a soft fabric exterior.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main zippered pocket and both handles with a padded grip.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the rounded end and the thickness of the bag, with handles visible from the top.
description_view_2: Back view displaying a diagonal accent strap and the main handles, with no external pocket.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the rounded end and additional strap details near the base.
attribute_handle_type: Two flexible, fabric handles with a padded synthetic leather grip, attached by stitching and rivets, non-retractable.
attribute_lock_mechanism: Zipper closure for both the main compartment and the front pocket; no visible lock mechanism.
attribute_external_pockets: One large front pocket with a horizontal zipper, approximately half the width of the bag.
